narrative: Japan FinMin Katayama warns of decisive FX action — USD/JPY at 159.82, testing 160.00 intervention threshold; 300bp carry vs intervention risk is the dominant trade-off. Gold lower -0.66% as S&P 500 -0.41%; DXY +0.09% on the back of a firmer USD. VIX at 19.3 keeps investors cautious; BoJ meeting on Apr 28 is the next key catalyst.
